test_a_sanity_correlation.interpretation: Does Σ(starter rolling xG) track actual team xG at all?

test_b_additive.interpretation: ADDITIVE test: does bottom_up explain residuals AFTER subtracting team-rolling baseline? Positive r = bottom-up has signal beyond team-rolling. Pre-registered threshold: r > 0.05 AND p < 0.05 AND CI strictly positive = SIGNAL
test_b_additive.verdict: SIGNAL — bottom-up explains residuals beyond team-rolling
test_b_additive.ci_verdict: CI strictly positive → robust additive signal

recommendation: 5-7 day bottom-up architecture build justified by signal evidence
caveats: MVP uses Sofa-only data (no Understat-fuzzy-match); xG NULL = treated as 0 (no shots)
Estimated minutes = 90 for all starters (no minute-prediction modeling)
Team-rolling baseline is sum-of-player-xg (cleaner than independent team_xg_history)
Test corpus is Top-5 × 24/25 ONLY — lower-tier untested (different data structure)
5-Gate G5 (ROI sim) deferred — this is signal-test only, not betting test
